description: Token Metrics provides cryptocurrency market data, AI-generated trading and investment grades, signals, reports, and related analytics tools. Its product is aimed at traders, investors, and developers building crypto analysis and automation applications.
summary: Token Metrics exposes one documented REST API at https://api.tokenmetrics.com with an OpenAPI spec mirrored by APIs.guru, plus published Python/JavaScript packages named `tmai-api`; the API requires a Token Metrics API key, while no public GraphQL or MCP connect endpoint was verified.
